# SCORE Financial Statements

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, manage-grow, formation,-operations,-growth

## Resource purpose
Financial statements education.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when the user needs to understand balance sheet, profit/loss, cash flow statements, or financial reporting.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
Formation, Operations, Growth

## Route the user here when
The user asks what financial statements mean or needs to prepare documents for planning/lenders/advisors.

## BOSS routing notes
- Route accounting/tax specifics to CPA/bookkeeper.

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
